title: Vizhiyae Vizhiyae Lyrics Idhu Kathirvelan Kadhal Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Vizhiyae Vizhiyae
Singers: Aalaap Raju
Movie: Idhu Kathirvelan Kadhal
Music: Harrish Jeyaraaj
Lyrics: Thamarai

Vizhiyae Vizhiyae thirai virigirathey
unnai paarthidum velayiley
Adhiley adhile padam varaigiradhey
manam serndhidum aasaigale.

Kadhiravanaaga prindha pagal
nilavena thaeyavum thunidhadhadi.
Karuniramaaga irundha nizhal
unadhiru paarvayil veluththadi.

Anabae unnai paarpadhum anubavame
unnaal uyir povadhum sugam sugame. (2)

Edhai nee sonnaalum viyappen
un azhagai kaiyendhi rasippen
Edhai nee sonnaalum viyappen
un azhagai kaiyendhi rasippen

adam ne seidhaalum poruppen
un kuralai cell phonil padhippen
pozhudhum unnodu iruppen
pun sirippil sombalgal murippen
Edhai nee sonnaalum viyappen
un azhagai kaiyendhi rasippen

Ilayum theendaadha kani nee
naan suvaikkum naal kittum poru nee
viralgal meettaadha isai ne
mellisaiyaai en kadhal vasam nee
thavame seiyaadha varam nee
pen kadale muththangal idu nee
Ilayum theendaadha kani nee
naan suvaikkum naal kittum poru nee

Vizhiyae Vizhiyae thirai virigirathey
unnai paarthidum velayiley
Adhiley adhile padam varaigiradhey
manam serndhidum aasaigale.

Kadhiravanaaga prindha pagal
nilavena thaeyavum thunidhadhadi.
Karuniramaaga irundha nizhal
unadhiru paarvayil veluththadi.

Anabae unnai paarpadhum anubavame
unnaal uyir povadhum sugam sugame.(2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Vizhiyae Vizhiyae?

The song expresses deep romantic feelings and the beauty of love, emphasizing the emotional connection between lovers.

What is the plot context of Idhu Kathirvelan Kadhal related to this song?

This song plays during a pivotal moment in the film, highlighting the romantic journey of the lead characters.

Who is the singer of Vizhiyae Vizhiyae?

The song is sung by Aalap Raju, known for his expressive vocal style.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Vizhiyae Vizhiyae was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj, a prominent music director in Tamil cinema.

When was Vizhiyae Vizhiyae released?

The song was released on January 21, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Vizhiyae Vizhiyae, the protagonist expresses his heartfelt emotions as he gazes at his beloved, encapsulating the essence of love and longing. The song's soothing melody, combined with Aalap Raju's captivating voice, creates a serene atmosphere that resonates with romantic sentiments. It serves as a backdrop to a significant moment in Idhu Kathirvelan Kadhal, enhancing the emotional depth of the narrative. Through its beautiful lyrics by Thamarai, the song evokes feelings of warmth and affection, making it a timeless romantic classic.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vizhiyae Vizhiyae from Idhu Kathirvelan Kadhal is a mesmerizing romantic melody that beautifully captures the essence of love. With Aalap Raju's soulful vocals and Thamarai's poetic lyrics, this song creates an enchanting atmosphere that resonates with listeners. Experience the magic of Harrish Jeyaraj's music that elevates this track to a must-listen for all romantic souls.
stanzaMeanings: Your eyes, your eyes, the screen opens up when I see you. In that moment, a picture comes to mind, and my heart is filled with desires.
Like the moon that shines brightly, you are a motherly figure. The shadow that was once filled with compassion now casts darkness on your gaze.
Seeing you is an experience; even if I lose my life, it feels good.
Whatever you say, I will be amazed; I will enjoy your beauty. Whatever you say, I will be amazed; I will enjoy your beauty.
Even if I do something foolish, I will listen to your voice on my cellphone. Whenever I am with you, I will smile and be happy. Whatever you say, I will be amazed; I will enjoy your beauty.
You are the fruit that I will enjoy; you are the treasure that I will cherish. You are the music that touches my heart; you should not let my love go away. You are the precious gem, my beloved.
Your eyes, your eyes, the screen opens up when I see you. In that moment, a picture comes to mind, and my heart is filled with desires.
Like the moon that shines brightly, you are a motherly figure. The shadow that was once filled with compassion now casts darkness on your gaze.
Seeing you is an experience; even if I lose my life, it feels good.
